---
title: Reproducible Research Workflows — Extended Workshop
sidebar: false
date: last-modified
author:
  - name: "Peter Degen"
    orcid: 0009-0004-0706-9200

  - name: "Gorka Fraga González"
    orcid: 0000-0002-1857-8607

  - name: "Fabio Molo"
    orcid: 0000-0001-9320-5854

  - name: "Samuel Pawel"
    orcid: 0000-0003-2779-320X

toc: false
page-layout: full
---

This workshop, organized by the [Center for Reproducible Science and Research Synthesis (CRS)](https://www.crs.uzh.ch/en.html) of the University of Zurich, introduces participants to a full reproducible research workflow. Each module combines conceptual slides with a hands-on demo.

# Modules

## [1. Version Control with Git](module_1_version_control/slides/index.qmd)

Tracking changes, collaborating, and archiving research with Git.

- [Slides](module_1_version_control/slides/index.qmd)
- [Hands-On Demo](module_1_version_control/demo/index.qmd)

## [2. Dynamic Reporting with R and Quarto](module_2_dynamic_reporting/slides/index.qmd)

Writing reproducible manuscripts and analyses using Quarto.

- [Slides](module_2_dynamic_reporting/slides/index.qmd)
- [Hands-On Demo (R)](module_2_dynamic_reporting/demo_R/index.qmd)
- [Hands-On Demo (Python)](module_2_dynamic_reporting/demo_py/index.qmd)

## [3. Workflow Management](module_3_workflow_management/slides/index.qmd)

Automating multi-step computational pipelines with Make and targets.

- [Slides](module_3_workflow_management/slides/index.qmd)
- [Hands-On Demo](module_3_workflow_management/demo/index.qmd)

## [4. Software Containers](module_4_containers/slides/index.qmd)

Encapsulating computational environments with Docker and Rocker.

- [Slides](module_4_containers/slides/index.qmd)
- [Hands-On Demo](module_4_containers/demo/index.qmd)

## [5. Sharing and Publishing](module_5_sharing_publishing/slides/index.qmd)

Publishing reproducible reports with GitLab Pages, Zenodo, and OSF.

- [Slides](module_5_sharing_publishing/slides/index.qmd)
- [Hands-On Demo](module_5_sharing_publishing/demo/index.qmd)

---

Visit the [Instructions](instructions/index.qmd) page for software installation and setup.
